info.title: Beta Masaheft API
info.description: API for the Beta Masaheft digital humanities platform, providing access to Ethiopian and Eritrean manuscript, work, person, place, institution, and narrative records.

tags.name: content-negotiation
tags.description: Resource URI resolution with content negotiation

tags.name: redirects
tags.description: Controller-level redirects — these paths return 302 and are handled entirely by controller.xql before reaching any RESTXQ module

get.summary: Retrieve TEI XML for a resource

get.description: Forwarded to decorations.html, rendered via modules/view.xql

Matches identifiers with an embedded passage reference, e.g. LIT1340EnochE.1.3 → /{collection}/{id}/text?ref=1.3, LIT1340EnochE.1.3-2.5 → ?start=1.3&end=2.5, BAVet1.1ra-4vb → ?start=1ra&end=4vb. Edition/translation variants (LIT1234name_ED_X or _TR_X) are also handled. The collection is inferred from the two-letter ID prefix (LI→works, NA→narratives, MS/BDL/etc→manuscripts, etc.).

parameters.name: idWithPassage
parameters.description: ID with optional passage suffix separated by a dot, e.g. LIT1340EnochE.1.3 or BAVet1.1ra-4vb

get.description: Forwards to index.html, rendered via modules/view.xql.

get.summary: Chart variant of the collection list view
get.description: Same filtering parameters as /{collection}/{id}/list but rendered as a chart. Forwarded to /restxq/BetMasWeb/{collection}/{id}/listChart.

get.summary: Browse view for a record or collection
Literary flow view for a specific record
Collation view for a specific record
Witness comparison view for a specific work
Selected-manuscript comparison view for a record

get.description: Any path starting with /corpus is forwarded to /restxq/BetMasWeb/corpus/{path}.

Any path containing 'morpho' is forwarded by the controller directly to /restxq/morpho/{subpath}, which is served by the separate morphological parser application. Documented sub-paths: xml/{query}, geta/{query}, alpheios/{query}, paradigm, conj, decl, patterns, affixes, letters, corpus. The root /morpho also accepts a query parameter.

parameters.name: subpath
parameters.description: One of: xml/{query}, geta/{query}, alpheios/{query}, paradigm, conj, decl, patterns, affixes, letters, corpus

get.description: Any path containing 'Dillmann' (and not 'PRS') is forwarded by the controller directly to /restxq/Dillmann/{path}, served by the separate Dillmann Lexicon application. Paths containing 'PRS' are excluded and fall through to normal ID resolution.
The controller matches any resource ending in .pdf, strips the extension to obtain the ID, and forwards to modules/tei2fo.xql which converts the TEI source to XSL-FO and returns a PDF.

get.summary: Main view of a record (without collection prefix)
get.description: Caught by ends-with(/main) in the controller; forwarded to /restxq/BetMasWeb/{id}/main. The collection is resolved internally from the record's type attribute.

get.description: Any .html resource not matched by a more specific rule is forwarded to modules/view.xql which renders the named HTML template from the app's templates directory.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Name of the HTML page (e.g. index, newSearch, apidoc)

get.description: The controller rewrites /{file}.json to /{file}.xq and executes it as XQuery to generate an OpenAPI JSON document. Used to serve the machine-readable API specification.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Name of the XQuery file that produces the spec (e.g. api)

get.description: unitType must be one of: UniProd, UniCirc, UniMain, UniMat, UniCah

parameters.name: unitType
parameters.description: Codicological unit type (UniProd, UniCirc, UniMain, UniMat, UniCah)

get.summary: Manuscript list viewer for a repository

get.description: Accepts a query string and returns HTML with morphological analysis and search form.
